title: Obsidian Just 10x’d Everyone’s Hermes Agent
summary: David Ondrej demonstrates how to connect Hermes Agent to Obsidian, presenting it as a significant performance improvement. The video covers integrating the Hermes Agent system with the Obsidian application for AI agent deployment.
writeup: David Ondrej walks through connecting the Hermes Agent system to the Obsidian application, framing the integration as a notable performance gain for AI agent deployment. The video focuses on the mechanics of wiring the two together so Hermes Agent runs against Obsidian. Concepts touched include AI agents, edge deployment, and API integration.
